adapterWhitelist(address).details: Used for controlling which swap adapters can be used

params.adapter: The adapter's address to check whitelist status for

assetsWithERC20Collateral(address,addres.details: Returns both ERC20 tokens and GT (Governance Token) positions

params.market: The market to query assets from
params.owner: The address to check assets for

returns.gtIds: Array of GT token IDs owned by the address

params.deadline: The deadline timestamp for the transaction
params.maxDebtAmt: Maximum amount of debt to take on
params.recipient: Address to receive the borrowed tokens
params.tokenAmtsWantBuy: Array of token amounts to buy

returns.gtId: ID of the generated GT token

params.recipient: Address to receive the borrowed tokens

returns.gtId: ID of the generated GT token

borrowTokenFromGt(address,address,uint25.details: Increases the debt of an existing position

params.gtId: ID of the GT token to borrow from
params.recipient: Address to receive the borrowed tokens

createOrderAndDeposit(address,address,ui.details: Creates a new order and deposits tokens to the market

params.debtTokenToDeposit: Amount of debt tokens to deposit
params.ftToDeposit: Amount of FT tokens to deposit
params.market: The market to create order in
params.maxXtReserve: Maximum amount of XT to reserve
params.xtToDeposit: Amount of XT tokens to deposit

flashRepayFromColl(address,address,uint2.details: Repays debt and closes a position

params.amtsToBuyFt: Array of amounts to buy for each order
params.byDebtToken: Whether to repay debt using debt tokens
params.deadline: The deadline timestamp for the transaction
params.gtId: ID of the GT token to repay debt from
params.market: The market to repay debt in
params.recipient: Address to receive any remaining collateral
params.units: Array of swap units defining the swap path

leverageFromToken(address,address,addres.details: Swaps tokens for XT and creates a leveraged position

params.amtsToBuyXt: Array of amounts of XT to buy for each order
params.deadline: The deadline timestamp for the transaction
params.market: The market to create position in
params.minXtOut: Minimum amount of XT to establish the position
params.units: Array of swap units defining the swap path

returns.gtId: ID of the generated GT token

leverageFromXt(address,address,uint128,u.details: Uses existing XT tokens to create a leveraged position

params.market: The market to create position in
params.tokenInAmt: Amount of additional tokens to use
params.units: Array of swap units defining the swap path
params.xtInAmt: Amount of XT tokens to use

returns.gtId: ID of the generated GT token

pause().details: Can only be called by authorized addresses

redeemAndSwap(address,address,uint256,(a.details: Executes a swap to redeem FT tokens

params.ftAmount: Amount of FT tokens to redeem
params.market: The market to redeem FT tokens in
params.minTokenOut: Minimum amount of output tokens to receive
params.recipient: Address to receive the output tokens
params.units: Array of swap units defining the swap path

returns.redeemedAmt: Actual amount of output tokens received

repayByTokenThroughFt(address,address,ui.details: Repays debt and closes a position

params.deadline: The deadline timestamp for the transaction
params.ftAmtsWantBuy: Array of FT amounts to buy for each order
params.gtId: ID of the GT token to repay debt from
params.market: The market to repay debt in
params.maxTokenIn: Maximum amount of tokens to spend
params.recipient: Address to receive any remaining tokens

sellTokens(address,address,uint128,uint1.details: Executes multiple orders to sell tokens

params.amtsToSellTokens: Array of amounts to sell for each order
params.deadline: The deadline timestamp for the transaction
params.ftInAmt: Amount of FT tokens to sell
params.market: The market to sell tokens in
params.minTokenOut: Minimum amount of output tokens to receive
params.recipient: Address to receive the output tokens
params.xtInAmt: Amount of XT tokens to sell

returns.netTokenOut: Actual amount of output tokens received

setAdapterWhitelist(address,bool).details: Used for controlling which swap adapters can be used

params.adapter: The adapter's address to set whitelist status for
params.isWhitelist: True to whitelist, false to remove from whitelist

swapExactTokenToToken(address,address,ad.details: Uses specified orders for the swap path

params.deadline: The deadline timestamp for the transaction
params.minTokenOut: Minimum amount of output tokens to receive
params.orders: Array of orders to use for the swap path
params.recipient: Address to receive the output tokens
params.tradingAmts: Array of amounts to trade for each order

returns.netTokenOut: Actual amount of output tokens received

swapTokenToExactToken(address,address,ad.details: Uses specified orders for the swap path

params.deadline: The deadline timestamp for the transaction
params.maxTokenIn: Maximum amount of input tokens to spend
params.orders: Array of orders to use for the swap path
params.recipient: Address to receive the output tokens
params.tradingAmts: Array of amounts to trade for each order

returns.netTokenIn: Actual amount of input tokens spent

unpause().details: Can only be called by authorized addresses

assetsWithERC20Collateral(address,addres.notice: Retrieves all assets owned by an address in a specific market

borrowTokenFromCollateral(address,addres.notice: Borrows tokens using collateral and XT

borrowTokenFromGt(address,address,uint25.notice: Borrows tokens from an existing GT position

createOrderAndDeposit(address,address,ui.notice: Creates an order and deposits tokens

leverageFromToken(address,address,addres.notice: Creates a leveraged position from input tokens

leverageFromXt(address,address,uint128,u.notice: Creates a leveraged position from XT tokens

redeemAndSwap(address,address,uint256,(a.notice: Redeems FT tokens and swaps for underlying tokens

sellTokens(address,address,uint128,uint1.notice: Sells FT and XT tokens for underlying tokens

swapExactTokenToToken(address,address,ad.notice: Swaps an exact amount of input token for output token

swapTokenToExactToken(address,address,ad.notice: Swaps tokens to receive an exact amount of output token
